nodes.name: Boyd Alexander
nodes.summary: Boyd Alexander是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Green longtail、Cameroon olive greenbul、Neumann's starling等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gosling's bunting
nodes.summary: Gosling's bunting（Gosling's bunting，学名 Emberiza goslingi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Boyd Alexander。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gosling's bunting (Emberiza goslingi), also known as the grey-throated bunting, is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae. It is found in Africa from Mauritania and Senegal to south-western Sudan and north-eastern Democratic Republic of Congo
